checks.name: npm run opensearch:health
checks.evidence: Remote OpenSearch 3.3.2 cluster returned green health before the BGE candidate index load.

checks.name: npm run load:cranfield:bge
checks.evidence: Created cranfield-v0-bge-base-en-v15-gen023 and loaded 1,400 Cranfield documents with 768-dimensional BGE vectors.

checks.name: npm run eval:cranfield:opensearch-vector
checks.evidence: Remote OpenSearch BGE hybrid reached graded nDCG@10 0.3533 and binary nDCG@20 0.4926.

checks.name: node --check scripts/load-cranfield-bge-opensearch.mjs && node --check scripts/evaluate-cranfield-opensearch-vector.mjs
checks.evidence: Remote BGE loader and evaluator scripts parsed successfully.

checks.name: npm run validate
checks.evidence: Node tests passed; MDE parser checked project JSON/JSONL files; traceability validator checked required IDs through GEN-023 and remote BGE artifacts; fixture index check passed; fixture evaluation passed.

blocked_or_skipped.name: Cloudflare deploy verification
blocked_or_skipped.reason: No deployment was requested; GEN-023 leaves the public/default architecture unchanged.

blocked_or_skipped.name: Phase 2 transferability validation
blocked_or_skipped.reason: Not part of this project-local Cranfield remote validation turn.

high_findings.summary: Candidate architecture promotion still requires transferability policy to be addressed.
BGE vector/hybrid now has both offline and remote OpenSearch evidence above refined PRF.

medium_findings.summary: BGE-feature LTR has the best graded offline nDCG@10 but may not justify complexity versus simpler remote BGE hybrid retrieval.

evidence_quality: GEN-023 validates that BGE vector/hybrid gains reproduce in remote OpenSearch while preserving the promotion boundary.
